_comment: Portable Optimus MCP config — copy the 'optimus' block into your .mcp.json. The relative path works from the repo root (Claude Code runs MCP servers with cwd=project root); no hardcoded /Users/... path. Set OPTIMUS_TOKEN + OPTIMUS_API_URL in your shell (source ~/.nemoclaw-env). A customer token (iss optimus-customer) auto-registers the customer-safe tool set only.
